task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully met: (1) New static function common_chat_params_init_mistral_instruct_v3 created in common/chat.cpp; (2) Handler correctly delegates to template for [INST]/[/INST] wrapping; (3) Template properly prepends system messages to first user turn; (4) </s> appended after assistant turns via eos_token; (5) Auto-detection correctly distinguishes from Ministral 3 by checking for absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT] while presence of [INST]; (6) LOG_DBG call identifies template; (7) COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY format used; (8) Handler dispatched with (tmpl, params); (9) Only chat.cpp and test file modified, no headers or existing handlers altered. Test case comprehensively validates behavior with expected output matching actual output.
